footerDisplay: Please follow the pairing process to get your API Key.

bridgeIp.title: Hue Bridge IP
bridgeIp.description: The IP address of your Philips Hue Bridge.

apiKey.title: Hue API Key
apiKey.description: Your Philips Hue application key (leave empty to start pairing).

useStandardActive.title: Expose toggle as a standard Switch service
useStandardActive.description: Off (default): the per-zone enable/disable toggle uses a private custom characteristic that stays hidden from Apple Home and Siri but remains usable in HomeKit automations and the Homebridge REST API. On: the toggle is exposed as a separate HAP Switch service on the accessory, making it visible in Apple Home and mappable as a controllable entity in Home Assistant via the HomeKit Controller integration.
